esqlQuery.esql:
TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
// Failed checks (while server UP) — server-level counter only
| WHERE haproxy.failed_checks IS NOT NULL
| WHERE haproxy.service_name != "FRONTEND" AND haproxy.service_name != "BACKEND"
| STATS fail_increase = SUM(INCREASE(haproxy.failed_checks))
  BY haproxy.proxy_name, haproxy.service_name, haproxy.addr
| WHERE fail_increase > 0
| EVAL alert_key = CONCAT(TO_STRING(haproxy.proxy_name), "::", TO_STRING(haproxy.service_name), "::", COALESCE(TO_STRING(haproxy.addr), ""))
| SORT fail_increase DESC
| LIMIT 50
